summary: A wildly trippy performance praised by fans, though the recording source and technical quality are not specified.
review: The lone review rates this concert a perfect five stars, calling it “off the chart” and highlighting its psychedelic vibe. No details about the audio source or sound quality were provided, so the recording’s technical merits remain unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: The single five‑star review indicates an exceptional show, but lack of any recording‑quality comments limits confidence in the overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers mentioned soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any technical issues.
